title: RC Low-Pass Filter
description: Attenuates high-frequency signals while passing low-frequency signals through a resistor-capacitor network.
fallback_netlist:
RC Low-Pass Filter
R1 vin vout 1k
C1 vout 0 1u
V1 vin 0 AC 1 SIN(0 1 1000)
.ac dec 100 1 100k
.control
run
plot v(vout) v(vin)
.endc
.end

title: Voltage Divider
description: Produces a fraction of its input voltage using two resistors in series.
fallback_netlist:
Voltage Divider
V1 vin 0 DC 5
R1 vin vout 10k
R2 vout 0 10k
.dc V1 0 5 0.1
.control
run
plot v(vout)
.endc
.end

title: Common Emitter Amplifier
description: NPN BJT amplifier configuration that provides voltage gain with 180-degree phase inversion.
fallback_netlist:
Common Emitter Amplifier
VCC vcc 0 DC 12
R1 vcc b 100k
R2 b 0 22k
RC vcc c 4.7k
RE e 0 1k
Q1 c b e BC547
V1 vin 0 AC 1 SIN(0 0.01 1000)
C1 vin b 10u
C2 c vout 10u
CE e 0 100u
RL vout 0 10k
.model BC547 NPN (IS=1e-14 BF=200 VAF=100)
.ac dec 100 100 1Meg
.control
run
plot v(vout) v(vin)
.endc
.end

title: Half-Wave Rectifier
description: Converts AC voltage to pulsating DC by allowing only one half-cycle of the input to pass.
fallback_netlist:
Half-Wave Rectifier
V1 vin 0 SIN(0 10 50)
D1 vin vout D1N4007
RL vout 0 1k
.model D1N4007 D (IS=1e-9 N=1.5 RS=0.01)
.tran 0.1m 40m 0
.control
run
plot v(vin) v(vout)
.endc
.end

title: LED with Current Limiting Resistor
description: Protects an LED from overcurrent damage by placing a series resistor to limit forward current.
fallback_netlist:
LED with Current Limiting Resistor
V1 vcc 0 DC 5
R1 vcc anode 330
D1 anode 0 LED
.model LED D (IS=1e-20 N=1.8 RS=5)
.dc V1 0 5 0.05
.control
run
plot v(anode)
.endc
.end

title: RL Circuit
description: Resistor-inductor series circuit that exhibits frequency-dependent impedance and phase shift.
fallback_netlist:
RL Circuit
V1 vin 0 SIN(0 5 1000)
R1 vin mid 100
L1 mid 0 10m
.tran 0.01m 5m 0
.control
run
plot v(vin) v(mid)
.endc
.end
